purpose: Close false-positive domain model feature rows for phase-05 detail/cart domain-model group.

set.sourceBehavior: `MenuItem.kt` is a pure data class with dish, price, rating, rating-count, and vegetarian fields only; it does not declare navigation routes, toolbar commands, drawers, tabs, or menu-surface callbacks.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS target keeps `MenuItem` as pure menu data through `MenuItemData`, then consumes that data from detail/cart stores and pages without placing navigation behavior inside the domain model layer.
verificationEvidence: Source inspection: `app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/domain/model/MenuItem.kt` contains only five scalar fields and no navigation/menu command APIs.

Target inspection: `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/domain/discovery_models.cj::MenuItemData`, `::DetailMenuItemData`, and `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/features/detail/detail_store.cj` preserve menu-item data for section rendering while leaving route changes to page/store surfaces.

Focused test evidence: `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` verifies selected-restaurant menu item data is exposed through the repository contract, and `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` verifies menu items still drive detail/cart state mutations without any model-layer navigation side effects.
set.notes: Source override: static analysis attached a navigation/menu-surface feature to a data-only model file. The translated target likewise keeps navigation outside the menu item model layer.

testEvidence.detail: `phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` covers repository exposure of translated menu-item data for the selected restaurant detail flow.
`phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` covers detail/cart mutations over translated menu-item data without model-layer navigation behavior.

manualEvidence.detail: `MenuItem.kt` is a pure data class and contains no navigation/menu-surface behavior to translate.

set.sourceBehavior: `MenuItem.kt` is a pure data class with menu metadata only; it does not request runtime permissions, handle permission callbacks, or access protected platform APIs.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS target keeps the menu item model as data-only through `MenuItemData` and related detail/cart snapshot wrappers, with no permission handling placed in the domain model layer.
verificationEvidence: Source inspection: `app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/domain/model/MenuItem.kt` contains only scalar menu fields and no permission or protected API calls.

Target inspection: `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/domain/discovery_models.cj::MenuItemData` and `::DetailMenuItemData` keep menu-item data pure while `detail_store.cj` and `cart_store.cj` consume it without permission logic.

Focused test evidence: `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` and `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` both exercise translated menu-item data flows, confirming the phase-05 target uses these models without any permission-gated behavior.
set.notes: Source override: static analysis attached a runtime-permission feature to a model file that only carries menu metadata. No permission behavior exists in either source or target model surfaces.

testEvidence.detail: `phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` covers repository exposure of translated menu-item data with no permission-gated API surface.
`phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` covers translated detail/cart state mutations driven by menu-item data without permission handling.

manualEvidence.detail: `MenuItem.kt` contains no runtime permission request or protected API access behavior.

set.sourceBehavior: `CartItem.kt` is a pure data class wrapping a `MenuItem` plus quantity; it does not implement navigation surfaces, toolbar actions, drawers, tabs, or menu commands.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS target preserves this role through `CartSnapshotItemData`, which is consumed by cart/detail stores and pages while keeping all route and toolbar behavior outside the domain model layer.
verificationEvidence: Source inspection: `app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/domain/model/CartItem.kt` contains only a `MenuItem` reference and mutable item count with no navigation APIs.

Target inspection: `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/domain/discovery_models.cj::CartSnapshotItemData`, `data/session/session_repository.cj::getCartItems`, and `features/cart/cart_store.cj::buildState` preserve cart-item data flow while leaving navigation behavior to page-level code.

Focused test evidence: `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` validates seeded cart items, and `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` validates cart quantity mutations over the translated cart snapshot model.
set.notes: Source override: static analysis attached navigation/menu-surface behavior to a quantity wrapper model. The target keeps the same data-only separation via `CartSnapshotItemData`.

testEvidence.detail: `phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` verifies the translated repository exposes seeded cart snapshot items.
`phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` verifies translated cart snapshot quantities mutate correctly for detail/cart flows.

manualEvidence.detail: `CartItem.kt` is a data-only quantity wrapper and contains no navigation/menu-surface behavior.

set.sourceBehavior: `CartItem.kt` only carries a `MenuItem` plus quantity state; it does not request permissions, process permission results, or invoke protected storage/media/location APIs.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS target keeps cart item state as pure data through `CartSnapshotItemData` and repository/store quantity helpers, with no permission handling placed in the domain model layer.
verificationEvidence: Source inspection: `app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/domain/model/CartItem.kt` contains only data fields and no permission or protected API references.

Target inspection: `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/domain/discovery_models.cj::CartSnapshotItemData`, `data/session/session_repository.cj`, and `features/cart/cart_store.cj` preserve cart item data/mutation flow without permission logic.

Focused test evidence: `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` and `entry/src/test/cangjie/phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` exercise translated cart snapshot behavior and confirm this phase uses data-only cart items rather than permission-gated model APIs.
set.notes: Source override: static analysis attached runtime-permission behavior to a cart quantity wrapper model. Neither the source model nor the translated target model carries permission logic.

testEvidence.detail: `phase02_repository_contract_test.cj` verifies the translated repository exposes cart snapshot data without any permission-gated API surface.
`phase05_detail_cart_state_mutations_test.cj` verifies translated cart quantity mutations without permission handling in the model layer.

manualEvidence.detail: `CartItem.kt` contains no runtime permission request, permission-result handling, or protected API access behavior.
